apps.name: Clipboard Workflow Utility
apps.summary: Role-specific clipboard workflow utility for prosumers; current leading app idea.
apps.nextStep: Prototype clipboard history + saved snippets + global search launcher as a local-first macOS MVP.
notes: Elon: start with a macOS local-first prototype — clipboard history, saved snippets, global search launcher, and one target-role starter pack. Defer sync, AI, sharing, analytics, and browser extensions.
Derived from TOP5_APP_OPPORTUNITIES.md as current top recommendation.

apps.name: Audio / Device Switching Utility
apps.summary: Apple-feasible adaptation of EarTrumpet-style audio workflow.
apps.nextStep: Validate actual platform constraints before choosing this over clipboard workflow.

apps.name: File Preview / Triage Utility
apps.summary: QuickLook-inspired file preview and triage workflow.
apps.nextStep: Check whether native Apple behaviors shrink the wedge too much.
